headline: US G.I. 💀🍆 IRAN DRONE DROP 💥🇮🇷 JORDAN 😱
text: US ARMY DUDE 💂‍♂️💀 gets BLOWN 🍆💥 in NORTHERN IRAQ after IRANIAN DRONE DRONE 🍄🇮🇷 down but the BOOM 💣 still KILLS 😵‍💫 during CONTROLLED DETONATION 🧨😩! Another soldier 🪖 gets WOUNDED 🩸😭 a DAY after JORDAN BASE ATTACK 💥 killed TWO ☠️ and ONE MISSING 🕳️💨! CENTCOM says 'UNIDENTIFIED REMAINS' 🔍🦴 found in JORDAN after FRIDAY IRAN STRIKE 🦅🇮🇷 and now the BODY COUNT 🧮💀 hits 17 after NAVY PILOT 🛩️😢 declared DEAD 🪦! IRAN 🇮🇷 says 50 DEAD ☠️ and 500+ WOUNDED 🏥 after US STRIKES 💣 over 3 WEEKS 📅! US STRIKES 🔨🪖 'DEGRADE' IRAN SHIPPING THREAT 🚢 in STRAIT OF HORMUZ 🌊 and 'SWIFTLY PUNISH' IRGC GUARDS 🛡️😡! Verified FOOTAGE 📹🔥 shows 2 IMPACTS 💥 and BIG EXPLOSION 🔥 at JORDAN BASE 🏰! IRAN CLOSES STRAIT 🚫🌊 and HITS US ALLIES 🇯🇴 after CEASEFIRE 💔 collapsed! JORDAN SUMMONS IRAN DIPLOMAT 🧳🇮🇷 yelling 'RED LINE CROSSED' 🚫🩸! JORDAN SHOOTS DOWN 3 MISSILES 🚀🛡️ and 4th FALLS in DESERT 🏜️! ISRAEL INTERCEPTS DEBRIS 🍄🛡️ near EILAT with NO HURT 😌! KUWAIT PLANT 🔥💧 hit AGAIN and GCC calls it CIVILIAN CRIME 🚫⚖️! IRAN CLAIMS US HIT BRIDGES 🌉✈️🚂 but US says 'ONLY MILITARY TARGETS' 🎯! TRUMP 🍊👑 declared DEAL 'OVER' on JULY 8 while KHAMENEI ✍️😡 says 'US SIGNATURE WORTHLESS' 🗑️🖋️! IRGC warns SHIPS 🚢 'UNSAFE ROUTES = ACCIDENTS' 💥😤! NUCLEAR PLANT ⚛️ in DARKHOVEYN and QESHM ISLAND 🏝️ STRUCK but UN SAYS 'NO NUKES YET' 🚫☢️! ESCALATION DAY 8 🗓️ and EVERYONE'S SWEATING 😰💦 in the GULF 🔥🌊!
